actions.name: Alluring
actions.description: Effect: All valid creatures in range have -1 default EVA Stage. When an affected creature leaves the range of this effect, they lose -1 EVA Stage for 3 Activations. The user's Conversation Skill checks have an additional +10 bonus. NEEDS REAUTOMATED.
